generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AADL parsing errors before addressing AGREE diagnostics.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or invalid declarations.
Ensure AGREE contracts use only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `int`, `real`, and `bool` for AGREE scalar type declarations.
Assignments (`assign`) are for implementation-level bindings to existing outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid adding architecture to resolve AGREE type errors; fix the expression instead.
Do not attempt to place guarantees in implementation scope.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction (component types, implementations, features, connections)
